channel.title: WRS Bitesize News
channel.description: Moderator-approved World Radio Switzerland news bulletins.

item.title: WRS feed test item — please ignore
item.description: This is a connectivity test for the WRS → Aiir RSS import. If you can see this in the throwaway News category, the feed pipeline works. It will roll off once real bulletins start flowing.
item.content:encoded: This is a connectivity test for the WRS → Aiir RSS import. If you can see this in the throwaway News category, the feed pipeline works. It will roll off once real bulletins start flowing.
